title: heterostemma dalzellii
intro: Heterostemma dalzellii, also known as the Indian spurge or the Dalzell's spurge, is a plant species within the family Apocynaceae, commonly found in the Western Ghats region of India. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antitumor, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Heterostemma dalzellii include its potential to treat various conditions such as cancer, fever, and skin infections, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-arthritic agent. Herbal preparations of Heterostemma dalzellii are often made into decoctions, infusions, or ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall health.
